---
name: Bug report (markdown / for CLI and agents)
about: Plain-markdown bug report. Use this when filing via `gh issue create` or the API.
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
---

<!--
Before filing:
- Check the docs at https://docs.ideal-postcodes.co.uk and existing issues.
- DO NOT include API keys, user tokens, customer addresses, or other personal data.
  Redact secrets and identifiers from any logs or output.
-->

- [ ] Ideal Postcodes API
- [ ] Address Finder Library

- [ ] Agent skills (@ideal-postcodes/skills)
- [ ] Documentation (docs.ideal-postcodes.co.uk)
- [ ] Other / not sure

<!-- A clear description of the bug. Required. -->

<!-- What should have happened instead. Required. -->

```
1. Run …
2. Observe …
```
